author: ton
text:
See: [trashhalo/imgcat#3](https://github.com/trashhalo/imgcat/issues/3)

Maybe this idea is already employed by Notcurses, if not, I think Notcurses can profit as well?

author: dankamongmen
text:
We're already doing this -- this is the "halfblock blitter", aka `NCBLIT_2x1`. We actually go beyond this with the Quadblitter `NCBLIT_2x2`, which uses quadrants and three-fourth quadrants. Indeed, we might go even further with the Hexblitter ([#1071](https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/issues/1071)).

If you're not seeing this high level of resolution, you're likely not setting `LANG` to a UTF-8 encoding.

author: dankamongmen
text: Closing this as already implemented. If you're having problems getting this level of resolution, let me know.
